diagrams.title: fork() Return Value Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how fork() returns different values to parent and child
diagrams.purpose: Understand fork() behavior and return value logic

diagrams.title: Parent-Child Process Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Tree structure showing process relationships after fork()
elements: PPID arrows connecting child to parent

diagrams.title: Zombie vs Orphan Process States
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing zombie and orphan process scenarios
elements: Zombie: child terminated, parent alive but no wait()
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate zombie and orphan process states

diagrams.title: fork()-exec() Pattern
diagrams.description: Standard pattern of creating and running new program
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Unix runs different programs in child processes
